schema.physical_description: How the body physically performs the gesture (posture, hand shape, movement)
schema.intent: The communicative purpose or message the gesture conveys
schema.emotional_state: Overall valence: positive, neutral, or negative
schema.arousal: Activation energy level: low, medium, or high (PAD dimensional model)
schema.emotional_adjectives: CBT-informed list of emotions associated with the gesture (Plutchik componential model)
schema.gesture_type: McNeill/Ekman taxonomy: emblem, illustrator-iconic, illustrator-metaphoric, illustrator-beat, illustrator-deictic, or adaptor
schema.body_parts: Body parts involved in performing the gesture (BAP anatomical coding)
schema.number_of_people: Participants required: single, 2 person, or 3 or more
schema.cultural_context: Geographic/cultural scope: universal, western, east-asian, southern-european, etc.

gestures.name: Thumbs Up
gestures.physical_description: Make a fist and extend the thumb straight upward; arm can be at waist or raised for visibility
gestures.intent: Signal approval, agreement, or that things are good

gestures.name: OK Sign
gestures.physical_description: Touch the tip of the index finger to the tip of the thumb forming a circle; remaining three fingers extend upward and slightly apart
gestures.intent: Confirm something is satisfactory or precise

gestures.name: Clapping
gestures.physical_description: Strike both open palms together repeatedly at chest height with fingers aligned; vary speed and force to match enthusiasm
gestures.intent: Applaud, congratulate, or celebrate an achievement

gestures.name: Double Thumbs Up
gestures.physical_description: Make fists with both hands and extend both thumbs straight upward simultaneously; hold at chest or shoulder height
gestures.intent: Express strong approval or enthusiastic agreement

gestures.name: Raised Fist - Solidarity
gestures.physical_description: Clench one hand into a tight fist and raise the arm straight overhead; body upright and chest open
gestures.intent: Show solidarity, unity, or empowerment

gestures.name: Arms Raised in V - Victory
gestures.physical_description: Raise both arms above the head in a wide V-shape with hands open or in fists; head tilted back slightly
gestures.intent: Celebrate a triumph or express elation

gestures.name: Head Nod with Chin Lift
gestures.physical_description: Tilt the chin upward in a brief, single upward nod; maintain eye contact
gestures.intent: Casually acknowledge or affirm someone

gestures.name: Left Turn Signal (Bicycle)
gestures.physical_description: Extend the left arm straight out to the side at shoulder height with palm facing downward or forward; hold steady while riding
gestures.intent: Signal an upcoming left turn to other road users

gestures.name: Right Turn Signal (Bicycle)
gestures.physical_description: Extend the right arm straight out to the side at shoulder height, or bend the left arm upward at a 90-degree angle at the elbow
gestures.intent: Signal an upcoming right turn to other road users

gestures.name: Stop Signal (Bicycle)
gestures.physical_description: Extend the left arm downward and to the side at a 45-degree angle with the palm open and facing backward
gestures.intent: Signal an upcoming stop to other road users

gestures.name: Air Quotes
gestures.physical_description: Raise both hands to head height and curl the index and middle fingers of each hand twice in a hooking motion, mimicking quotation marks
gestures.intent: Indicate sarcasm, irony, or skepticism about a term

gestures.name: Finger Wag - Scolding
gestures.physical_description: Extend the index finger upward and swing it side to side in a pendulum motion at face height; facial expression stern
gestures.intent: Scold or warn someone against a behavior

gestures.name: Counting Off Points on Fingers
gestures.physical_description: Hold one hand up and use the index finger of the other hand to tap or grasp each finger in sequence while listing items
gestures.intent: Enumerate key arguments or items in a discussion

gestures.name: Hand Chop into Palm
gestures.physical_description: Strike the edge of one flattened hand into the open palm of the other in repeated downward chops, emphasizing each point
gestures.intent: Emphasize a critical point with force and conviction

gestures.name: Palms Together - Pleading
gestures.physical_description: Press both palms flat together at chest height in a prayer-like position; lean the body slightly forward with earnest expression
gestures.intent: Earnestly beg, plead, or make a heartfelt request

gestures.name: Mind-Blown Gesture
gestures.physical_description: Place both hands on either side of the head with fingers together, then fling them outward while spreading fingers wide, mimicking an explosion
gestures.intent: Express that something is overwhelmingly amazing or shocking

gestures.name: Italian Pinched Fingers
gestures.physical_description: Bring all five fingertips together pointing upward, forming a tight cone shape; bob the hand up and down at the wrist
gestures.intent: Question, emphasize, or express disbelief about what was said

gestures.name: About Yea Big - Framing
gestures.physical_description: Hold both hands in front of the body with palms facing each other; adjust the distance between them to indicate approximate size
gestures.intent: Estimate or communicate the approximate size of an object

gestures.name: Index Finger Point
gestures.physical_description: Extend the index finger straight out while curling the remaining fingers into the palm; arm extends toward the target with the wrist aligned
gestures.intent: Direct attention to a specific location, object, or person

gestures.name: Open Palm Point
gestures.physical_description: Extend the arm toward the target with all fingers together and palm facing upward or sideways; wrist relaxed and fingers straight
gestures.intent: Politely indicate a direction or draw attention to something

gestures.name: Beckoning with Index Finger
gestures.physical_description: Curl the index finger repeatedly toward the body in a hooking motion while the hand is held at chest height, palm facing inward
gestures.intent: Summon someone to come closer

gestures.name: Beckoning with Full Hand Palm Up
gestures.physical_description: Hold the hand out with palm facing upward and repeatedly curl all four fingers toward the body in a scooping motion
gestures.intent: Warmly invite someone to approach

gestures.name: Waving Arm Overhead
gestures.physical_description: Raise one arm fully above the head and wave it side to side in broad sweeping arcs; hand open with fingers spread
gestures.intent: Signal your location or get attention from a distance

gestures.name: Two-Handed Over Here Wave
gestures.physical_description: Raise both arms above shoulder height and wave them simultaneously toward the body in large inward-sweeping arcs
gestures.intent: Emphatically beckon someone to come over

gestures.name: Palm-Out Push Gesture
gestures.physical_description: Extend one or both arms forward with palms facing outward and fingers together; push slightly away from the body
gestures.intent: Refuse entry or set a physical boundary

gestures.name: After You Open Palm Sweep
gestures.physical_description: Extend one arm to the side with palm facing upward and sweep it forward in a smooth arc, gesturing toward the path ahead
gestures.intent: Offer someone to proceed ahead of you

gestures.name: Open Hand Wave
gestures.physical_description: Raise one hand to head height with palm facing outward and pivot the hand side to side at the wrist, fingers together or slightly spread
gestures.intent: Greet or say goodbye to someone

gestures.name: Single Raised Palm Greeting
gestures.physical_description: Raise one hand to head height with palm flat and facing outward; hold it still momentarily
gestures.intent: Acknowledge or formally greet someone

gestures.name: High Five
gestures.physical_description: Raise one hand above head height with palm facing the other person; slap palms together with the partner at the peak of the reach
gestures.intent: Celebrate a shared success or connect enthusiastically

gestures.name: Peace Sign on Departure
gestures.physical_description: Raise the hand with index and middle fingers extended in a V-shape, palm facing outward; hold briefly while stepping away
gestures.intent: Bid a casual farewell with goodwill

gestures.name: Salute
gestures.physical_description: Bring the right hand sharply to the right brow with fingers together and palm tilted slightly downward; elbow raised to shoulder height
gestures.intent: Show formal respect or acknowledge authority

gestures.name: Finger Guns
gestures.physical_description: Point both index fingers forward with thumbs raised like pistol hammers; optionally flick the thumbs down as if firing while nodding
gestures.intent: Playfully acknowledge or greet someone with confidence

gestures.name: Hat Tip Gesture
gestures.physical_description: Reach up and pinch the brim of an imaginary hat between the thumb and index finger; tilt it slightly forward while nodding the head
gestures.intent: Acknowledge someone with polite charm

gestures.name: About to Hug
gestures.physical_description: Open both arms wide at shoulder height with palms facing inward; step forward slightly with a warm facial expression
gestures.intent: Welcome someone with an embrace

gestures.name: Chef's Kiss
gestures.physical_description: Bring the fingertips of one hand together and touch them to the lips; pull the hand away while opening the fingers in a blossoming motion
gestures.intent: Express that something is perfect or exquisite

gestures.name: Blowing a Kiss
gestures.physical_description: Place the fingertips of one open hand against the lips; extend the arm outward while opening the palm as if releasing the kiss into the air
gestures.intent: Send love or affection to someone at a distance

gestures.name: Two Hands Heart
gestures.physical_description: Curve both hands symmetrically with fingertips touching at top and thumb-bases meeting at bottom to form a large heart shape; hold at chest level
gestures.intent: Express love, gratitude, or deep appreciation

gestures.name: Dab Pose
gestures.physical_description: Drop the head into the crook of one bent arm while simultaneously extending the other arm out diagonally in the opposite direction
gestures.intent: Celebrate or show off with a viral pop-culture move

gestures.name: Evil Horns (Rock On)
gestures.physical_description: Extend the index and pinky fingers upward while curling the middle and ring fingers down with the thumb; hold the hand up
gestures.intent: Express rock spirit, rebellion, or intense excitement

gestures.name: Bang Bang (Finger Pistols)
gestures.physical_description: Form both hands into finger-gun shapes with index fingers extended and thumbs up; point and flick thumbs down as if shooting
gestures.intent: Playfully point at someone for fun or emphasis

gestures.name: Money Rubbing Gesture
gestures.physical_description: Rub the thumb against the pads of the index and middle fingers in a repeated sliding motion, palm facing upward
gestures.intent: Refer to money, cost, or suggest something is expensive

gestures.name: Palm-Up Hand Extension
gestures.physical_description: Extend one arm forward with the hand open and palm facing upward; hold steady at waist height
gestures.intent: Request payment, a tip, or offer to receive something

gestures.name: Thumbs Down
gestures.physical_description: Make a fist and extend the thumb straight downward; arm held at chest height or lowered for emphasis
gestures.intent: Signal disapproval or rejection

gestures.name: Head Shake with Wagging Finger
gestures.physical_description: Extend the index finger upward and wag it side to side while simultaneously shaking the head left and right
gestures.intent: Scold or firmly refuse someone

gestures.name: X Formed with Forearms
gestures.physical_description: Cross both forearms in front of the chest forming an X-shape; hands flat or in fists, palms facing inward
gestures.intent: Strongly block or refuse something

gestures.name: Palm-Out Stop Hand
gestures.physical_description: Raise one hand to head height with palm flat and facing outward; fingers together and arm fully extended
gestures.intent: Command someone to halt or cease an action

gestures.name: Both Palms Pushing Away
gestures.physical_description: Extend both arms forward with palms facing outward and push repeatedly away from the body at chest height
gestures.intent: Reject or create distance from something unwanted

gestures.name: Facepalm
gestures.physical_description: Raise one open hand and slap it flat against the forehead or upper face; hold briefly with eyes closed or looking down
gestures.intent: Express disbelief or frustration at a mistake or absurdity

gestures.name: Dismissive Backhand Wave
gestures.physical_description: Flick the back of the hand outward and away from the body in a quick, careless sweeping motion at waist height
gestures.intent: Dismiss or show disregard for someone or something

gestures.name: Exasperated Shrug with Hands Raised
gestures.physical_description: Raise both shoulders toward the ears while lifting both palms upward to shoulder height; head tilts slightly to one side with mouth open
gestures.intent: Express helpless frustration or disbelief

gestures.name: D'oh Facepalm
gestures.physical_description: Slap the forehead with the heel of the palm while wincing and tilting the head back slightly; hand slides down the face
gestures.intent: Express self-directed frustration over one's own blunder

gestures.name: Tensed Fingers
gestures.physical_description: Hold both hands in front of the torso with fingers spread wide and curled like claws; muscles visibly tensed and body rigid
gestures.intent: Express barely contained anger or intense stress

gestures.name: Number One
gestures.physical_description: Raise the index finger straight up from a closed fist; hold at face or chest height
gestures.intent: Indicate the number one or signal 'first'

gestures.name: Number Two
gestures.physical_description: Extend the index and middle fingers upward in a V-shape from a closed fist; palm facing outward
gestures.intent: Indicate the number two or signal 'second'

gestures.name: Number Three
gestures.physical_description: Extend the index, middle, and ring fingers upward from a closed fist; thumb holds the pinky down
gestures.intent: Indicate the number three

gestures.name: Number Four
gestures.physical_description: Extend all four fingers upward with the thumb folded across the palm; fingers together or slightly spread
gestures.intent: Indicate the number four

gestures.name: Number Five
gestures.physical_description: Open the hand fully with all five fingers spread apart and palm facing outward; hold at face height
gestures.intent: Indicate the number five

gestures.name: Number Six
gestures.physical_description: Show five fingers on one hand and extend the index finger on the other; or fold the pinky and ring finger showing thumb, index, and middle
gestures.intent: Indicate the number six

gestures.name: Number Seven
gestures.physical_description: Show five fingers on one hand and extend the index and middle fingers on the other hand
gestures.intent: Indicate the number seven

gestures.name: Number Eight
gestures.physical_description: Show five fingers on one hand and extend three fingers on the other hand
gestures.intent: Indicate the number eight

gestures.name: Number Nine
gestures.physical_description: Show five fingers on one hand and extend four fingers on the other hand
gestures.intent: Indicate the number nine

gestures.name: Number Ten
gestures.physical_description: Open both hands fully with all ten fingers spread and palms facing outward
gestures.intent: Indicate the number ten

gestures.name: Hitchhiker's Thumb
gestures.physical_description: Make a loose fist and extend the thumb outward, jerking it over the shoulder or pointing it in the direction of travel
gestures.intent: Request a ride or casually indicate a direction behind you

gestures.name: Hand-as-Phone Gesture
gestures.physical_description: Extend the thumb and pinky finger while curling the middle three fingers; hold the thumb to the ear and the pinky near the mouth
gestures.intent: Suggest making or receiving a phone call

gestures.name: Hand-as-Camera Framing
gestures.physical_description: Form an L-shape with each hand using the thumb and index finger; hold them together to create a rectangular frame and look through it
gestures.intent: Frame a scene or composition as if viewing through a lens

gestures.name: Hand Visor - Shading Eyes
gestures.physical_description: Place one flat hand horizontally above the eyebrows with palm facing downward; squint and look into the distance
gestures.intent: Shield eyes from light or search for something far away

gestures.name: Shoulder Shrug Palms Up
gestures.physical_description: Raise both shoulders toward the ears while turning both palms upward at waist height; eyebrows lifted and mouth slightly downturned
gestures.intent: Express uncertainty, ignorance, or indifference

gestures.name: Call Me Hand
gestures.physical_description: Extend the thumb and pinky finger with middle fingers curled; hold near the ear or wave casually with a nod
gestures.intent: Suggest that someone should call you or stay in touch

gestures.name: Typing on Air Keyboard
gestures.physical_description: Hold both hands in front of the body at waist height with fingers curved and rapidly tap the fingers up and down as if typing on an invisible keyboard
gestures.intent: Indicate working on a computer, writing, or data entry

gestures.name: Washing Hands
gestures.physical_description: Rub both hands together in circular motions, palms sliding over the backs of the hands alternately, mimicking lathering with soap
gestures.intent: Demonstrate hand hygiene or indicate cleanliness

gestures.name: Counting One Through Five
gestures.physical_description: Sequentially extend fingers starting from the index finger, adding one finger at a time until all five are shown on one hand
gestures.intent: Enumerate items or count from one to five

gestures.name: Counting Six Through Ten
gestures.physical_description: Use both hands, starting with five fingers on one hand and extending fingers on the second hand from one to five
gestures.intent: Continue counting from six to ten

gestures.name: Just a Little Bit Gesture
gestures.physical_description: Hold the thumb and index finger close together with a tiny gap between them; remaining fingers curled into the palm
gestures.intent: Indicate a very small amount or degree

gestures.name: Praying Hands
gestures.physical_description: Press both palms flat together with fingers pointing upward at chest or chin height; eyes may close and head may bow
gestures.intent: Pray, express deep gratitude, or show spiritual reverence

gestures.name: Middle Finger
gestures.physical_description: Extend the middle finger straight up from a closed fist with the back of the hand facing the recipient
gestures.intent: Express extreme contempt or hostility toward someone

gestures.name: Talk to the Hand
gestures.physical_description: Thrust one arm forward with the palm flat and facing the other person; fingers together, head turned away dismissively
gestures.intent: Dismiss someone with exaggerated disregard

gestures.name: Loser L on Forehead
gestures.physical_description: Form an L-shape with the thumb and index finger and press it against the forehead with the L facing outward
gestures.intent: Mock someone by branding them a loser

gestures.name: Cuckoo Sign
gestures.physical_description: Extend the index finger and rotate it in small circles next to the temple; eyebrows raised with a knowing look
gestures.intent: Imply that someone is irrational or out of their mind

gestures.name: Nose Thumb
gestures.physical_description: Place the thumb on the tip of the nose with fingers spread wide and wiggle the fingers; optionally stack the second hand on top
gestures.intent: Taunt or mock someone in a childish, defiant way

gestures.name: Finger to Lips - Shh
gestures.physical_description: Place the extended index finger vertically against closed lips; other fingers curled into the palm, eyes widened slightly
gestures.intent: Request silence or signal that a secret should be kept

gestures.name: Zipped Lips Gesture
gestures.physical_description: Pinch the thumb and index finger together and drag them across the closed lips from one corner to the other, mimicking a zipper
gestures.intent: Promise to keep quiet or that a secret is sealed

gestures.name: Hand Cupped Behind Ear
gestures.physical_description: Cup one hand and place it behind the ear, tilting the head toward the speaker; lean the body slightly forward
gestures.intent: Ask someone to speak louder or repeat themselves

gestures.name: Hands Over Mouth - Surprise
gestures.physical_description: Raise both hands and press them flat over the open mouth; eyes widen and body recoils slightly backward
gestures.intent: React to something shocking or unexpectedly delightful

gestures.name: Pinch Gesture for Tiny
gestures.physical_description: Press the pads of thumb and index finger nearly together, leaving an almost invisible gap; hold at eye level and squint slightly
gestures.intent: Indicate something is extremely small

gestures.name: Hands Apart for Height
gestures.physical_description: Hold one hand flat and horizontal at a lower position and the other at a higher position; palms face downward to mark vertical distance
gestures.intent: Indicate the height or vertical dimension of something

gestures.name: Timeout T-Shape (Sports)
gestures.physical_description: Form a T-shape by placing one flat hand horizontally on top of the fingertips of the other vertical hand; raise above head for referee visibility
gestures.intent: Call an official timeout during a sporting event

gestures.name: Muscle Flex
gestures.physical_description: Bend one or both arms at the elbow and contract the biceps; fists clenched, arms pulled tight to the body
gestures.intent: Display strength or celebrate a physical achievement

gestures.name: Team Chant Hands
gestures.physical_description: All members extend one hand into the center of a circle, stacking hands on top of each other; raise and release together on a chant
gestures.intent: Build team unity and shared commitment before an activity

gestures.name: Timeout T-Shape
gestures.physical_description: Form a T-shape by placing one flat hand horizontally on top of the fingertips of the other vertical hand at chest height
gestures.intent: Request a pause or timeout during group activity

gestures.name: Snapping Fingers
gestures.physical_description: Press the middle finger against the thumb pad and flick it down to strike the base of the thumb, producing a sharp snap sound
gestures.intent: Demand immediate attention or signal recall of an idea

gestures.name: Hand Clap for Attention
gestures.physical_description: Clap both open palms together in one or two sharp, loud strikes at chest height; body oriented toward the group
gestures.intent: Command a group's attention with an auditory cue

gestures.name: Raised Hand - Classroom Style
gestures.physical_description: Raise one arm straight up with the palm open and fingers together; hold it steady above the head
gestures.intent: Request a turn to speak or ask a question

gestures.name: Tapping Wrist - Hurry Up
gestures.physical_description: Tap the index finger of one hand repeatedly on the inside of the opposite wrist where a watch would be; eyebrows raised
gestures.intent: Urge someone to hurry or signal that time is running out

gestures.name: Rapid Come-On Beckoning
gestures.physical_description: Extend one hand forward and rapidly curl all fingers toward the palm in quick, repeated beckoning motions
gestures.intent: Urgently beckon someone to follow or hurry over

gestures.name: Two Hands Complete Stop
gestures.physical_description: Thrust both arms forward with palms flat and facing outward at shoulder height; fingers together and body braced
gestures.intent: Command an immediate and total stop

gestures.name: Timeout Crossed Hands
gestures.physical_description: Form a T-shape by placing one flat hand horizontally on top of the fingertips of the other vertical hand at chest height
gestures.intent: Request a pause or break in activity

gestures.name: Two-Hand Finger Whistle
gestures.physical_description: Insert the thumb and index finger of each hand into the mouth, pressing against the tongue; blow sharply to produce a loud whistle
gestures.intent: Get attention from a long distance with a piercing signal

gestures.name: Pinky Promise
gestures.physical_description: Hook the pinky finger of one hand around the pinky finger of the other person's hand; shake gently up and down
gestures.intent: Seal a solemn promise or pact between two people

gestures.name: Crossed Fingers for Luck
gestures.physical_description: Cross the middle finger over the index finger on one hand and hold it up; sometimes hidden behind the back
gestures.intent: Hope for good luck or a favorable outcome
